title: An elementary treatise on analytical geometry : embracing plane co-ordinate geometry, and an introduction to geometry of three dimensions

# An elementary treatise on analytical geometry : embracing plane co-ordinate geometry, and an introduction to geometry of three dimensions

Contributors: johnson, william woolsey
Date: 1869
Subjects: geometry, analytic

"Designed as a text-book for colleges and scientific schools." Also available in digital form.
